homepage.title: Alex Chen
homepage.greeting: Type {help} to see commands, or jump straight to {cv}, {github}, or {linkedin}.

profile.name: Alex Chen
profile.summary: Product-minded software engineer with experience building multilingual web products, data workflows, and cloud-native services. Comfortable moving between frontend interfaces, backend APIs, automation, and developer tooling. Interested in reliable systems, thoughtful UX, and practical applications of AI-assisted software development.

entries.name: Southern Cross Institute of Technology
entries.note: Coursework focus: distributed systems, human-computer interaction, and data engineering.

items.label: Frontend
items.value: JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Vite, HTML, CSS, accessibility, responsive design

items.label: Backend
items.value: Node.js, Python, REST APIs, PostgreSQL, Redis, background jobs

items.label: Cloud & DevOps
items.value: Docker, GitHub Actions, Linux, Nginx, AWS, observability basics

items.label: AI Tooling
items.value: Prompt workflows, evaluation scripts, document processing, coding assistants

jobs.title: Software Engineer
responsibilities: Built customer-facing dashboards with React and TypeScript, improving task completion flows for support and operations teams.
Designed REST API endpoints and background workers for account workflows, notifications, and usage reporting.
Introduced structured logging and deployment checks that reduced time spent diagnosing release issues.
Collaborated with product and design partners to turn ambiguous workflow problems into scoped, testable iterations.

jobs.title: Full-stack Developer
responsibilities: Implemented document ingestion pipelines for PDF, spreadsheet, and form data used by internal review teams.
Created reusable UI components for search, filtering, bulk actions, and audit views.
Automated recurring data quality checks and generated operational reports for stakeholders.
Maintained CI workflows and improved test coverage around critical parsing and export behavior.

jobs.title: Junior Developer
responsibilities: Delivered responsive websites and small business applications using modern JavaScript and server-rendered templates.
Integrated third-party payment, email, and analytics services with clear configuration boundaries.
Documented setup steps and handover notes so non-specialist clients could maintain their content safely.

custom_projects.title: OhMyCV
custom_projects.desc: A static, multilingual CV renderer driven by JSON configuration, with job-specific overrides and print-friendly output.

custom_projects.title: Dataset QA Toolkit
custom_projects.desc: A small command-line toolkit for validating CSV schemas, sampling records, and producing review summaries.

custom_projects.title: Support Macro Library
custom_projects.desc: Reusable templates and scripts that helped a support team standardize common customer responses.

projects.title: Docs Improvements
projects.desc: Improved installation guides, examples, and issue templates for developer tooling projects.

projects.title: Bug Fixes
projects.desc: Contributed small fixes around accessibility, configuration loading, and test reliability.
